//PURPOSE: COLLISION-DETECTION backfill sink. Uses INSERT-only writes so a
//PURPOSE2: cross-source _id that already exists FAILS with E11000 and lands in the
//PURPOSE3: DLQ instead of silently overwriting — this is how overlaps surface for a
//PURPOSE4: decision. Run this ONLY during the initial snapshot phase, then delete it
//PURPOSE5: and start mongo-sink-cdc.json for steady-state CDC (see README, Phasing).
//REQUIRES: Pair with source setting publish.full.document.only=true during this
//REQUIRES2: phase, and drive one sink per target namespace (database/collection set
//REQUIRES3: explicitly below, or one instance per topic), because insert-only mode
//REQUIRES4: writes the plain document and cannot read ns.db/ns.coll for routing.
name: mongo-sink-backfill

config.//topic: One merged topic == one target collection. Set database/collection to it.
config.//insert: Insert-only: duplicate _id -> E11000 -> DLQ (NOT an overwrite).
config.//errs: Duplicate-key failures are EXPECTED signal here — capture, don't crash.
config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: dlq.collision.juno.orders
